operation.name: write_at_psmgr_sendmsg
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun new_window_sz () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  new_window_sz (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  new_window_sz (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  new_window_sz (_ bv1 32) ) (select  new_window_sz (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (and  (=  false (=  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) ) (bvule  ?B1 (_ bv4096 32) ) ) (=  false (bvult  ?B1 (_ bv4096 32) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun new_window_sz () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  new_window_sz (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  new_window_sz (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  new_window_sz (_ bv1 32) ) (select  new_window_sz (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (and  (=  false (=  (_ bv0 32) ?B1 ) ) (bvule  ?B1 (_ bv4096 32) ) ) (bvult  ?B1 (_ bv4096 32) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: psmgr_proc_ctx.window_sz stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs
assumptions: producer sets window_sz without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
